mapper.insert: insert into permission(name, sn, url, icon, type, parent_id) values(#{name}, #{sn}, #{url}, #{icon}, #{type}, #{parentId})
mapper.update: update permission set name = #{name}, sn = #{sn}, url = #{url}, icon = #{icon}, type = #{type}, parent_id = #{parentId} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, name, sn, url, icon, type, parent_id as parentId from permission where id = #{id}
select id, name, sn, url, icon, type, parent_id as parentId from permission

select id, name, sn, url, icon, type, parent_id as parentId from permission
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and sn like concat('%', #{sn}, '%')
and url like concat('%', #{url}, '%')
